PTR2ESEA.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Super Effective Announcer
PTR2ESEA.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Play the announcement when a PTR2e attack resolves with type effectiveness above x1.
PTR2ESEA.Settings.PlaySound.Name: Play Announcement Sound
PTR2ESEA.Settings.PlaySound.Hint: Play the synchronized 8-bit sound with the animation.
PTR2ESEA.Settings.Volume.Name: Announcement Volume
PTR2ESEA.Settings.Volume.Hint: Set the sound volume for all connected users.
PTR2ESEA.Settings.ScreenWidth.Name: Animation Screen Width
PTR2ESEA.Settings.ScreenWidth.Hint: Set the animation width as a proportion of the Foundry viewport.
PTR2ESEA.Settings.TopOffset.Name: Animation Top Offset
PTR2ESEA.Settings.TopOffset.Hint: Set the animation distance in pixels from the top of the Foundry viewport.
PTR2ESEA.Errors.SequencerUnavailable: PTR2e Super Effective Announcer requires an active Sequencer module.
